message:
fix(freeze): fix materializeVStack cross-expression dedup and switch pattern sp

Three related sp accounting fixes:

1. materializeVStack: Use countStackRefsMulti to deduplicate stack refs
   ACROSS all vstack items, not just within each one. When two vstack
   items both reference stack[sp-1], they consume 1 unique stack
   position, not 2.

2. Switch pattern (relooper): Don't pop the discriminant in the emitted
   switch statement. The original if-else chain (dup+push+eq+if_false)
   has net-0 sp change, so case handler blocks and default continuation
   blocks expect the discriminant still on the stack.

3. Add sp overflow/underflow detection at block entries for debugging.
   Emits checks in both full codegen and relooper paths.
